display-name.lang: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: FIM Speedway Grand Prix Highlights
programme.desc: Action from the sixth round of the season in Malilla, Sweden.

programme.title: MLB Plays of the Week
programme.desc: A look at the most exciting plays from the past week's matches.

programme.title: Live MLB
programme.desc: Philadelphia Phillies v New York Mets (Start-time 12.10am). Coverage of the National League match from Citizens Bank Park, as both sides play their first game back after the All-Star game break. This is the first match in a three-game series and the first meeting between these teams since another three-match contest in New York towards the end of June.

programme.title: MLB Plays of the Week
programme.desc: A look at the most exciting plays from the past week's matches.

programme.title: TNT Sports Reload
programme.desc: The best bits from TNT Sports over the last week, including exclusive interviews, top action, and more.

programme.title: MLB
programme.desc: Action from the 2026 Home Run Derby.

programme.title: MLB
programme.desc: Action from the 2026 All Star Game.

programme.title: TNT Sports Reload
programme.desc: The best bits from TNT Sports over the last week, including exclusive interviews, top action, and more.

programme.title: WRC Review
programme.desc: A look back at Rally Estonia, which served as the eighth round of the season.

programme.title: Live World Rally Championship
programme.desc: The Rally Estonia. Coverage from special stages one, two and three of the ninth round of the season, which takes place in Tartu County.

programme.title: WRC: More Than Machine
programme.desc: Champion Thierry Neuville faces crisis while new Hyundai signee Adrien Fourmaux delivers a stunning performance, setting the stage for Gregoire Munster's emotional comeback.

programme.title: Live World Rally Championship
programme.desc: The Rally Estonia. Coverage from special stages four, five and six of the ninth round of the season, which takes place in Tartu County.

programme.title: MotoGP Rewind
programme.desc: A look back at the best of the action from the 2026 MotoGP Grand Prix of Germany.

programme.title: Live World Rally Championship
programme.desc: The Rally Estonia. Coverage from special stage seven of the ninth round of the season, which takes place in Tartu County.

programme.title: TCR World Tour Review
programme.desc: Action from rounds six and seven at Circuit Paul Ricard in Le Castellet.

programme.title: AFL
programme.desc: Sydney Swans v Adelaide Crows.

programme.title: Ultimate Pool
programme.desc: Action from the Group 5 matches in the Champions League tournament, as four players competed in a series of round-robin matches to earn a place in the Super 8's.

programme.title: The Muddy Roots of Football - Part 1
programme.desc: Following a football team in the highlands of Ireland made of members of the same family who speak a language that none of their opponents understand.

programme.title: The Muddy Roots of Football - Part 2
programme.desc: In Copsa Mica, the pollution created by industrial activity has impacted the health of the local team and forced them to transplant a football pitch from a nearby village.

programme.title: The Muddy Roots of Football - Part 3
programme.desc: With a cemetery behind one of the goals, this is where players of Vilar de Barrio play. The clay pitch is described as the 'worst in Spain' and the coach is running for mayor.

programme.title: The Muddy Roots of Football - Part 4
programme.desc: In Ireland, a home captain recounts the previous night's Christmas party, and a tight and terrible game ends with the captain getting told off by his mother.

programme.title: The Muddy Roots of Football - Part 5
programme.desc: Witness the remarkable journey of the one-armed goalkeeper who has defied all odds and refuses to give up.

programme.title: MLB
programme.desc: Action from the 2026 All Star Game.

programme.title: UFC
programme.desc: Conor McGregor v Max Holloway. Action from the welterweight bout at T-Mobile Arena in Las Vegas, Nevada, plus the undercard for UFC 329.

programme.title: UFC Reloaded
programme.desc: We revisit UFC 110 from February 2010 in Sydney, featuring the captivating headline bout between Minotauro Nogueira and Cain Velasquez.

programme.title: UFC Reloaded
programme.desc: A look back at the thrilling welterweight clash between Gunnar Nelson and Rick Story at UFC Fight Night in Stockholm, from October 2014.

programme.title: Formula E Flashback
programme.desc: A look back at a thrilling 2015 race at Battersea Park Street Circuit in London. Nelson Piquet Jr. had an opportunity to claim his first Formula E title.

programme.title: The Gallagher PREM
programme.desc: Exeter Chiefs v Saracens.

programme.title: The Gallagher PREM
programme.desc: Bath v Leicester Tigers.

programme.title: The Gallagher PREM
programme.desc: Sale Sharks v Bristol Bears.

programme.title: The Gallagher PREM
programme.desc: Harlequins v Northampton Saints.

programme.title: The Gallagher PREM
programme.desc: Gloucester v Newcastle Red Bulls.

programme.title: The Gallagher PREM
programme.desc: Northampton Saints v Leicester Tigers. Action from the semi-final match at cinch Stadium at Franklin's Gardens.

programme.title: The Gallagher PREM
programme.desc: Bath Rugby v Exeter Chiefs. Action from the semi-final at The Recreation Ground.

programme.title: The Gallagher PREM
programme.desc: Northampton Saints v Exeter Chiefs. Action from the final at Allianz Stadium Twickenham.

programme.desc: The most exciting moments from the eighth round of the season at Donington Park Circuit in the United Kingdom.

programme.desc: A look back at the best action from the fourth round of the season at Snetterton Circuit.

programme.title: IFSC Climbing World Series Highlights
programme.desc: Action from the latest round of the season in Chamonix, France.

programme.title: The Football Archives: UEFA Champions League
programme.desc: This episode of The Football Archives takes a look at the 1992/93 UEFA Champions League season.

programme.title: The Football Archives: UEFA Champions League
programme.desc: This episode of The Football Archives takes a look at the 1993/94 UEFA Champions League season.

programme.title: The Football Archives: UEFA Champions League
programme.desc: This episode of The Football Archives takes a look at the 1994/95 UEFA Champions League season.

programme.title: The Football Archives: UEFA Champions League
programme.desc: A look at the 1996/97 UEFA Champions League season.

programme.title: World Rally Championship
programme.desc: Action from the first day of the Rally Estonia.

programme.title: Offroad Odyssey
programme.desc: Adrenaline-pumping action, breathtaking scenery, and unforgettable encounter off-road.

programme.title: 18 Holes With Natalie Gulbis and Jimmy Hanlin
programme.desc: Jimmy Hanlin and Natalie Gulbis showcase some of the best golf destinations.

programme.title: Golfing the World
programme.desc: Highlighting golf courses and private resorts from around the world.

programme.title: Tennis
programme.desc: Coverage from the world of tennis.

programme.title: Live: NBA Summer League Basketball
programme.desc: From Thomas & Mack Center in Las Vegas.

programme.title: Golf at Altitude
programme.desc: Green Valley Ranch Golf Club hosts the Colorado Open Championships and features a full range practice facility in addition to its courses.

programme.title: NBA Summer League Basketball
programme.desc: From Thomas & Mack Center in Las Vegas.

programme.title: World Poker Tour
programme.desc: High-stakes tournament poker from some of the world's famous casinos and card rooms.

programme.title: 1916 Gold Rarity
programme.desc: Own the first-ever Gold issue of the legendary 1916 Mercury Dime today. This special 2026 Gold Mercury Dime comes with a bonus Silver Medal, both dated 1916 in tribute to the classic coin and graded Perfect 70 condition in exclusive holders!

programme.title: Tired of Pain? Go Drug-Free
programme.desc: See how a drug-free patch is helping people find relief-without medication.

programme.title: 1916 Gold Rarity
programme.desc: Own the first-ever Gold issue of the legendary 1916 Mercury Dime today. This special 2026 Gold Mercury Dime comes with a bonus Silver Medal, both dated 1916 in tribute to the classic coin and graded Perfect 70 condition in exclusive holders!

programme.title: Tired of Pain? Go Drug-Free
programme.desc: See how a drug-free patch is helping people find relief-without medication.

programme.title: Ready for a safer shower? Enjoy a one-day bath remodel with Jacuzzi.
programme.desc: Trusted brand Jacuzzi Bath Remodel and interior designer Christina Hall share their secrets on how you can easily and affordably transform your bathroom into a gorgeous custom, safe, stylish space in 1 day! Call for a FREE quote & installation.

programme.title: Tired of Pain? Go Drug-Free
programme.desc: See how a drug-free patch is helping people find relief-without medication.

programme.title: NBA Summer League Basketball
programme.desc: From Thomas & Mack Center in Las Vegas.

programme.title: Altitude Extra
programme.desc: Vic Lombardi sat down with Denver Nuggets legend Dan Issel to discuss his basketball career, his involvement with horse racing and his evaluation of Nikola Jokić.

programme.title: World Poker Tour
programme.desc: Professional poker action from a series of international tournaments.

programme.title: Pirates Classics
programme.desc: World Series, Game 7. From Oct. 17, 1971.

programme.title: Pirates Classics
programme.desc: Paul Skenes pitches six shutout innings while sitting down nine Reds batters, in a victory for the Pirates. August 22, 2024.

programme.title: Pirates Classics
programme.desc: Paul Skenes remains dominant, striking out nine batters in a Pirates shutout effort over the Diamondbacks. July 27, 2025.

programme.title: Pirates Classics
programme.desc: Paul Skenes strikes out eight while surrendering only two hits over 6 innings in a dominant effort over the Los Angeles Dodgers, to earn his 10th win of the season. September 4, 2025.

programme.title: 18 Holes With Natalie Gulbis and Jimmy Hanlin
programme.desc: Jimmy Hanlin and Natalie Gulbis showcase some of the best golf destinations.

programme.title: Swing Clinic With Jimmy Hanlin
programme.desc: Golf tips, strategy and review of products.

programme.title: Pirates Classics
programme.desc: Cutch gets clutch against the Diamondbacks. June 8, 2011.

programme.desc: Back Pain? Hip? Sleep well thanks to this cooling topper!

programme.desc: The Pirates and Astros battle it out in an early-season marathon. April 25, 2007.

programme.title: Pirates Classics
programme.desc: The Pittsburgh Pirates defeat the New York Mets in a pitching duel between John Candelaria and Hall of Famer Tom Seaver.

programme.title: Fair Territory with Ken Rosenthal
programme.desc: MLB insider Ken Rosenthal covers baseball's latest news and pressing issues.

programme.title: Live: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: The Pirates play the Guardians in Game 1 of a three-game series at Progressive Field. Pittsburgh are fresh off a series sweep against Milwaukee while Cleveland swept the series against Miami. Brandon Lowe leads Pittsburgh with 21 home runs.

programme.title: Live: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: The Rays play the Red Sox in a doubleheader Game 1 to make up for a May 9 rainout at Fenway Park. The Rays lead the season series, 5-1. Griffin Jax is the expected starter for the Rays while Jake Bennett is expected to start for the Red Sox.

programme.title: Live: Blair & Barker
programme.desc: Jeff Blair and Kevin Barker talk all things Blue Jays, and Major League Baseball.

programme.title: Live: The FAN Pregame
programme.desc: Ailish Forfar and Justin Cuthbert discuss the stories that matter most to sports fans.

programme.title: Live: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: The Los Angeles Dodgers meet the New York Yankees at Yankee Stadium to open a three-game series. Shohei Ohtani leads the Dodgers in home runs and batting average, while Ben Rice leads the Yankees in home runs, batting average and runs batted in.

programme.title: The Wright Way
programme.desc: To honor one of the most beloved players in Mets history, SNY presents a special original documentary celebrating the legacy of David Wright. From his earliest days in Queens to his rise as team captain and fan favorite.

programme.title: Live: Baseball Night in N.Y.
programme.desc: A cast of leading New York baseball writers and other experts to discuss the latest off-season news involving the Mets, Yankees, and key division rivals.

programme.title: Oh Yeah ...
programme.desc: Stories in New York sports from 2005.

programme.title: Oh Yeah ...
programme.desc: Stories in New York sports from 2004.

programme.desc: Boxing action featuring up-and-coming fighters and promising contenders.

programme.title: Live: Mets Postgame
programme.desc: Analyst Gary Apple along with special guests review highlights from the previous New York Mets game, as well as giving extended commentary and in-depth insight to the team's overall performance.

programme.title: Live: SportsNite
programme.desc: SportsNite takes viewers inside all things New York sports by discussing the latest sports news of the night.

programme.desc: Ideal Prostate is the only Prostate Formula with a patented blend to relieve both PROSTATE & BLADDER Symptoms. Tune in for a Special TV offer!

programme.title: No Gamble, No Future
programme.desc: Eric Persson, Jean-Robert Bellande, Patrik Antonius, Sean Perry, Lynne Ji, Maria Ho, Eli Elezra, Jimmy D'Ambrosio, Dylan DeStefano, Nick Schulman, Krish Menon, David Williams, Alan Keating and Boston Rob Mariano play a variety of stakes.

programme.title: MLB Home Run Derby in 30
programme.desc: Highlights from the 2026 MLB Home Run Derby.

programme.title: MLB All-Star Game in 30
programme.desc: Highlights from the 2026 MLB All-Star Game.

programme.title: No Gamble, No Future
programme.desc: Nik Airball, Eli Elezra, Mark Ianelli, Jennifer Tilly, Eric Persson and Phil Hellmuth play $100/$200 No-Limit Hold'em.

programme.title: World's Strongest Man
programme.desc: Athletes compete for the title of world's strongest man.

programme.title: Live: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: The Orioles take on the Astros at Daikin Park in Game 1 of a three-game series. Baltimore swept Kansas City while Houston enters this match up only one win against Texas in a three-game series. Yordan Alvarez leads the Astros with 31 home runs.

programme.title: Lake Commandos
programme.desc: Host Mark Courts joins guest Mitch Anderson on a mission to find fall, shallow-water walleyes on jerkbaits.

programme.title: Livin' the Dream With Captain Jimmy Nelson
programme.desc: Livin' the Dream follows Captain Jimmy Nelson and his wife Luiza as they travel and fish in exotic locales.

programme.title: George Poveromo's World of Saltwater Fishing
programme.desc: George Poveromo fishes for mahi and yellowtails in the Keys.

programme.title: Saltwater Underground With Nick Honachefsky
programme.desc: Exploring the fishing destinations and the subculture scene of salty characters that come along with it, we embody the local mentality, with boots on the ground.

programme.title: Unfathomed
programme.desc: Follow Capt. George in search of fish and adventure.

programme.title: The Fish Guyz
programme.desc: Fishing the Islamorada back country with Capt. Matt Bellinger; George and Lain fight over food at Mangrove Mike's; chef Cat prepares a seared mahi-mahi with pineapple salsa recipe submitted by fan Helen Whitmer.

programme.title: Spear Life
programme.desc: The Spear Life crew teams up with Captain Cameron Sebastian in Myrtle Beach, South Carolina, to hunt trophy gag grouper on deep offshore wrecks before wrapping up the adventure with a fresh hook-and-cook.

programme.title: Julie Higgs Spearfishing
programme.desc: A lifelong spearfishing aficionado, Julie Higgs first discovered her passion while sailing aboard her family's sailboat in the Bahamas, where fish dinners caught by pole-spear were as much a tradition as a pastime. Now, armed with years of experience and an unquenchable thirst for adventure, Julie traverses the globe in pursuit of trophy fish and uncharted marine species-combining expert technique

programme.title: Uncharted Waters With Peter Miller
programme.desc: Peter targets false albacore, known as albies, up off Cape Cod with Capt. Jack and Robbie. They stop by The Port Restaurant for some epic food with Peter's old pal and restaurateur, Griffin Brackett.

programme.title: Livin' the Dream With Captain Jimmy Nelson
programme.desc: Livin' the Dream follows Captain Jimmy Nelson and his wife Luiza as they travel and fish in exotic locales.

programme.title: George Poveromo's World of Saltwater Fishing
programme.desc: George Poveromo fishes for mahi and yellowtails in the Keys.

programme.title: Saltwater Underground With Nick Honachefsky
programme.desc: Exploring the fishing destinations and the subculture scene of salty characters that come along with it, we embody the local mentality, with boots on the ground.

programme.title: Unfathomed
programme.desc: Follow Capt. George in search of fish and adventure.

programme.desc: Fishing the Islamorada back country with Capt. Matt Bellinger; George and Lain fight over food at Mangrove Mike's; chef Cat prepares a seared mahi-mahi with pineapple salsa recipe submitted by fan Helen Whitmer.

Now, armed with years of experience and an unquenchable thirst for adventure, Julie traverses the globe in pursuit of trophy fish and uncharted marine species-combining expert technique

programme.desc: George Poveromo fishes for mahi and yellowtails in the Keys.

programme.title: Saltwater Underground With Nick Honachefsky
programme.desc: Exploring the fishing destinations and the subculture scene of salty characters that come along with it, we embody the local mentality, with boots on the ground.

programme.title: Unfathomed
programme.desc: Follow Capt. George in search of fish and adventure.

programme.title: The Fish Guyz
programme.desc: Fishing the Islamorada back country with Capt. Matt Bellinger; George and Lain fight over food at Mangrove Mike's; chef Cat prepares a seared mahi-mahi with pineapple salsa recipe submitted by fan Helen Whitmer.

programme.title: Spear Life
programme.desc: The Spear Life crew teams up with Captain Cameron Sebastian in Myrtle Beach, South Carolina, to hunt trophy gag grouper on deep offshore wrecks before wrapping up the adventure with a fresh hook-and-cook.

programme.title: Julie Higgs Spearfishing
programme.desc: A lifelong spearfishing aficionado, Julie Higgs first discovered her passion while sailing aboard her family's sailboat in the Bahamas, where fish dinners caught by pole-spear were as much a tradition as a pastime. Now, armed with years of experience and an unquenchable thirst for adventure, Julie traverses the globe in pursuit of trophy fish and uncharted marine species-combining expert technique

programme.title: Uncharted Waters With Peter Miller
programme.desc: Peter targets false albacore, known as albies, up off Cape Cod with Capt. Jack and Robbie. They stop by The Port Restaurant for some epic food with Peter's old pal and restaurateur, Griffin Brackett.

programme.title: Livin' the Dream With Captain Jimmy Nelson
programme.desc: Livin' the Dream follows Captain Jimmy Nelson and his wife Luiza as they travel and fish in exotic locales.

programme.title: George Poveromo's World of Saltwater Fishing
programme.desc: George Poveromo fishes for mahi and yellowtails in the Keys.

programme.title: Saltwater Underground With Nick Honachefsky
programme.desc: Exploring the fishing destinations and the subculture scene of salty characters that come along with it, we embody the local mentality, with boots on the ground.

programme.title: Unfathomed
programme.desc: Follow Capt. George in search of fish and adventure.

programme.title: The Fish Guyz
programme.desc: Fishing the Islamorada back country with Capt. Matt Bellinger; George and Lain fight over food at Mangrove Mike's; chef Cat prepares a seared mahi-mahi with pineapple salsa recipe submitted by fan Helen Whitmer.

programme.title: Spear Life
programme.desc: The Spear Life crew teams up with Captain Cameron Sebastian in Myrtle Beach, South Carolina, to hunt trophy gag grouper on deep offshore wrecks before wrapping up the adventure with a fresh hook-and-cook.

programme.title: Julie Higgs Spearfishing
programme.desc: A lifelong spearfishing aficionado, Julie Higgs first discovered her passion while sailing aboard her family's sailboat in the Bahamas, where fish dinners caught by pole-spear were as much a tradition as a pastime. Now, armed with years of experience and an unquenchable thirst for adventure, Julie traverses the globe in pursuit of trophy fish and uncharted marine species-combining expert technique

programme.title: Uncharted Waters With Peter Miller
programme.desc: Peter targets false albacore, known as albies, up off Cape Cod with Capt. Jack and Robbie. They stop by The Port Restaurant for some epic food with Peter's old pal and restaurateur, Griffin Brackett.

programme.title: Livin' the Dream With Captain Jimmy Nelson
programme.desc: Livin' the Dream follows Captain Jimmy Nelson and his wife Luiza as they travel and fish in exotic locales.

programme.title: George Poveromo's World of Saltwater Fishing
programme.desc: George Poveromo fishes for mahi and yellowtails in the Keys.

programme.title: Saltwater Underground With Nick Honachefsky
programme.desc: Exploring the fishing destinations and the subculture scene of salty characters that come along with it, we embody the local mentality, with boots on the ground.

programme.title: Unfathomed
programme.desc: Follow Capt. George in search of fish and adventure.

programme.title: The Fish Guyz
programme.desc: Fishing the Islamorada back country with Capt. Matt Bellinger; George and Lain fight over food at Mangrove Mike's; chef Cat prepares a seared mahi-mahi with pineapple salsa recipe submitted by fan Helen Whitmer.

programme.title: Spear Life
programme.desc: The Spear Life crew teams up with Captain Cameron Sebastian in Myrtle Beach, South Carolina, to hunt trophy gag grouper on deep offshore wrecks before wrapping up the adventure with a fresh hook-and-cook.

programme.title: Julie Higgs Spearfishing
programme.desc: A lifelong spearfishing aficionado, Julie Higgs first discovered her passion while sailing aboard her family's sailboat in the Bahamas, where fish dinners caught by pole-spear were as much a tradition as a pastime. Now, armed with years of experience and an unquenchable thirst for adventure, Julie traverses the globe in pursuit of trophy fish and uncharted marine species-combining expert technique

programme.title: Uncharted Waters With Peter Miller
programme.desc: Peter targets false albacore, known as albies, up off Cape Cod with Capt. Jack and Robbie. They stop by The Port Restaurant for some epic food with Peter's old pal and restaurateur, Griffin Brackett.

programme.title: Fly Fusion
programme.desc: Join four of Fly Fusion's editors as they float down one of British Columbia's most renowned and scenic rivers while grappling with why it is they've dedicated their lives to this unique pastime.

programme.title: The New Fly Fisher
programme.desc: Jeff Parks makes his way to the Gander River fishing with Gander River Outfitters searching for Atlantic Salmon.

programme.title: Wild Game Cooking With Chef Rupert
programme.desc: Chef Rupert prepares pulled Elk Empanadas with Japanese BBQ sauce.

programme.title: Vintage Vessels
programme.desc: Classic vessels at the Vintage Boat Show in Gravenhurst, Ont., include a 1925 Neptune, a 1949 Shepherd and a 1935 triple cockpit Seabird.

programme.title: Gary Cooper's Fishing Diary
programme.desc: Celebrating Canada Day fishing at Port Eliza Lodge.

programme.title: NRL Rugby
programme.desc: From CommBank Stadium in Parramatta, New South Wales, Australia.

programme.title: FA Cup Classics
programme.desc: From Jan. 4, 2003.

programme.title: FA Cup Classics
programme.desc: 2003 FA Cup.

programme.title: World's Strongest Man
programme.desc: Athletes compete for the title of world's strongest man.

programme.title: Rugby Super League
programme.desc: From Odsal Stadium in Bradford, England.

programme.title: NRL Rugby
programme.desc: From CommBank Stadium in Parramatta, New South Wales, Australia.

programme.title: FA Cup Classics
programme.desc: From Jan. 4, 2003.

programme.title: FA Cup Classics
programme.desc: 2003 FA Cup.

programme.title: MotoGP Racing
programme.desc: From Sachsenring in Hohenstein-Ernstthal, Sachsen, Germany.

programme.title: Sportsnet World Highlights
programme.desc: A look at the best stories from around the world of sports.

programme.title: NRL Rugby
programme.desc: From Allianz Stadium in Sydney.

programme.title: By the Books
programme.desc: Host Dave Ross, with the latest betting information to get you set for your day.

programme.title: FA Cup Classics
programme.desc: From March 8, 2003.

programme.title: FA Cup Classics
programme.desc: From Feb. 4, 2004.

programme.title: INSIDE: Ducati Lenovo Team
programme.desc: A weekly, behind the scenes look at the highs, lows and realities of racing in the Ducati Lenovo team!

programme.title: Live: Super League On Sportsnet
programme.desc: Rugby action from Super League series.

programme.title: Live: Rugby Super League
programme.desc: From Accu Stadium in Huddersfield, England, United Kingdom.

programme.title: Rugby Super League
programme.desc: From Accu Stadium in Huddersfield, England, United Kingdom.

programme.title: FA Cup Classics
programme.desc: From March 8, 2003.

programme.title: FA Cup Classics
programme.desc: From Feb. 4, 2004.

programme.title: NRL Rugby
programme.desc: From Allianz Stadium in Sydney.

programme.title: Into High Country
programme.desc: Into High Country seeks to capture the most compelling and wide array of authentic hunting adventures from the most epic landscapes the Western U.S. and North America have to offer. Featured is a wide array of bow and rifle hunts for big game such as elk, mule deer, black bear, moose, pronghorn, and many more incredible and fascinating wild animal species.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steve hunts turkeys at Yturria Ranch with Luke Combs.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steve takes Evan Felker, lead singer of Turnpike Troubadours, on his first Alaskan black bear hunt.

programme.title: Pigman: The Series
programme.desc: Brian Pigman Quaca is a true-blue original—an unapologetic, high-energy host with a larger-than-life personality that has redefined outdoor television. With an unrelenting passion for the chase, Pigman takes on the world's toughest hunts, using any legal means necessary to put game on the ground. While his reputation was built on hardcore hog hunting, don't be mistaken—his skills extend far beyond

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons
programme.desc: In a classic western, Clint Eastwood -- aka Blondie -- saves Eli Wallach from the hangman's noose three separate times by shooting and severing the rope that he hangs from; recreating each scene and testing the reality of those shots.

programme.title: Ranch America
programme.desc: River Klass goes behind the scenes at the rodeo called the "Daddy of 'em All.".

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: Conservation Officers serve warrants to a suspect believed to have taken eighteen deer without licenses.

programme.title: Guns & Ammo TV
programme.desc: Our editors discuss the Springfield Armory Echelon Alpha.

programme.title: Gun Stories
programme.desc: More than three decades after the Vietnam War, when the totals of modern American snipers were added up, it was discovered that one man had 103 confirmed kills and as many as 216 probable kills, more than any other Marine Corps sniper; host Joe Mantegna explores the life and accomplishments of Chuck Mawhinney.

programme.title: Dirt Trax TV
programme.desc: The guys head to Hatfield McCoy for a little business retreat while also riding Big Coal River and Braveheart trail systems.

programme.title: Handguns
programme.desc: Steel targets provide immediate visual and auditory feedback, making them an excellent resource for handgun training.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steve hunts turkeys at Yturria Ranch with Luke Combs.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steve takes Evan Felker, lead singer of Turnpike Troubadours, on his first Alaskan black bear hunt.

programme.title: Ranch America
programme.desc: River Klass goes behind the scenes at the rodeo called the "Daddy of 'em All.".

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: Conservation Officers serve warrants to a suspect believed to have taken eighteen deer without licenses.

programme.title: Guns & Ammo TV
programme.desc: Our editors discuss the Springfield Armory Echelon Alpha.

programme.title: Gun Stories
programme.desc: More than three decades after the Vietnam War, when the totals of modern American snipers were added up, it was discovered that one man had 103 confirmed kills and as many as 216 probable kills, more than any other Marine Corps sniper; host Joe Mantegna explores the life and accomplishments of Chuck Mawhinney.

programme.title: Wild Upland
programme.desc: Tanner Smedley heads to Wyoming for a waterfowl hunt in an unlikely place.

programme.title: Huntworx
programme.desc: Colbi Geis travels to remote Canada in search of a musk ox with nothing but his Hoyt bow in hand.

programme.title: Jim Shockey's: The Professionals
programme.desc: Hiking and hunting in Nepal.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steve takes Evan Felker, lead singer of Turnpike Troubadours, on his first Alaskan black bear hunt.

programme.title: Whitetail Properties
programme.desc: Missouri Land Specialist Brock Utecht is a rock star in the land of plenty, using his positive attitude and servitude while in the field.

programme.title: Haymaker Hunting
programme.desc: In Colorado, King partners with RSI Outdoors' owner, Tarry Bratton, and visits HARTEIS RANCH with Freddy, harvesting his first Colorado antelope.

programme.title: Crossroads With the Burtons
programme.desc: NASCAR O Reilly Auto Parts Series driver Jeb Burton and his father, NASCAR legend Ward Burton, take viewers beyond the checkered flag in Crossroads with the Burtons, where the excitement of racing meets a lifelong passion for hunting, conservation and the great outdoors.

programme.title: RNT-V
programme.desc: It's been 10 years since John made the first J. Stephens calls, but his experience with the craft started way before then; from making calls inspired by call makers from the past to the formation of the J. Stephens Owners Group.

programme.title: Art of Wild
programme.desc: Art of wild is a film series that aims to tell stories about the wild in the most cinematic way possible. To tell the best stories we travel to the most incredible places. It is in the wild places where most won't go that the human spirit is fed. Only a hunter knows what it's like to wake up with the woods, or hear a bull bugle in the graylight, these moments are what make up the beauty of the wil

programme.title: Hunter
programme.desc: HUNTER® is an exciting new series being produced by Hunter Brand Media and hosted by Dave Poteat, that explores the different ways people use their natural hunter element. The first season is rooted in good ole North American big game hunting which is where Host Dave Poteat's roots run the deepest. But as the series grows in the years to come, we will venture out from the comforts of the Whitetail

programme.title: Pigman: The Series
programme.desc: Brian Pigman Quaca is a true-blue original—an unapologetic, high-energy host with a larger-than-life personality that has redefined outdoor television. With an unrelenting passion for the chase, Pigman takes on the world's toughest hunts, using any legal means necessary to put game on the ground. While his reputation was built on hardcore hog hunting, don't be mistaken—his skills extend far beyond

programme.title: Elk Camp
programme.desc: Renowned elk caller and professional guide Steve Chappell guides his clients on up-close, bugling elk hunts in Arizona and Colorado. Steve's calling skills and capacity for understanding elk behavior are on display each week.

programme.title: Bob Redfern's Outdoor Magazine
programme.desc: Quail hunting with ladies behind the success of Southern Woods.

programme.title: Big Deer TV
programme.desc: Three Purple Heart heroes join Mike and the Big Deer crew in Virginia. Part 2.

programme.title: Hoge Wild
programme.desc: Hoge Wild is an exhilarating adventure TV series that follows the charismatic country music artist and host, Lucas Hoge, as he embarks on thrilling escapades around the world. With a passion for music, hunting, fishing, and scuba diving, Lucas Hoge brings a unique blend of talents to the screen. Viewers are taken on a wild ride as Lucas explores diverse landscapes, from rugged mountains to crystal

programme.title: Winchester Deadly Passion
programme.desc: Winchester Deadly Passion is a show that will keep the viewer on the edge of their seat with hardcore style hunting mixed with Melissa's genuine and fun-loving personality.

programme.title: Big Water Angler
programme.desc: Big Water Angler takes viewers on an adventurous journey across the Great Lakes region and beyond, exploring the best fishing destinations, techniques, and insider tips from seasoned captains and guides.

programme.title: Let's Fish TV
programme.desc: Let's Fish TV is a weekly look at fishing in the Southern U.S. The program features both fresh and saltwater fishing for most southern species, and gives tips on where and how to catch the most popular game fish in the region.

programme.title: Dropped: Project Origin
programme.desc: A look at life behind the lens from the men that make it happen.

programme.title: MOJO TV
programme.desc: Terry meets up with Get Ducks' Ramsey Russell for an unreal duck hunting adventure in Argentina.

programme.title: Our Way of Life
programme.desc: During the herring spawn, Mike continues the long tradition of passing down generational knowledge to Heather, ensuring she can share this knowledge with her community now and in the future.

programme.title: Backwoods Life
programme.desc: For over 20 years Michael Lee and Kevin Knighton have been blessed to bring the Backwoods Life hunting show and outdoor television into the homes of loyal viewers each week. The guys work hard to bring their lives, personalities and experiences to the show while demonstrating what the average person goes through each year trying to fill tags and their freezers.

programme.title: Adrenaline
programme.desc: Early season food sources come into play in two different states as the Illinois and Iowa deer season rolls in.

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: Conservation Officers serve warrants to a suspect believed to have taken eighteen deer without licenses.

programme.title: Guns & Ammo TV
programme.desc: Our editors discuss the Springfield Armory Echelon Alpha.

programme.title: Gun Stories
programme.desc: More than three decades after the Vietnam War, when the totals of modern American snipers were added up, it was discovered that one man had 103 confirmed kills and as many as 216 probable kills, more than any other Marine Corps sniper; host Joe Mantegna explores the life and accomplishments of Chuck Mawhinney.

programme.title: Hoge Wild
programme.desc: Hoge Wild is an exhilarating adventure TV series that follows the charismatic country music artist and host, Lucas Hoge, as he embarks on thrilling escapades around the world. With a passion for music, hunting, fishing, and scuba diving, Lucas Hoge brings a unique blend of talents to the screen. Viewers are taken on a wild ride as Lucas explores diverse landscapes, from rugged mountains to crystal

programme.title: Hardcore Pursuit
programme.desc: Follow Mike Pelletier and the hearty gang of northern hunters as they chase whitetail deer, mule deer, elk, moose, bear, turkey and whatever else proves to be an exciting challenge all across North America during Season 18 of HARDCORE Pursuit.

programme.title: Everything Eichler
programme.desc: Fred Eichler takes viewers on thrilling bow and predator hunts, showcasing the complete field-to-table lifestyle alongside family, friends, and clients. As the host, Fred shares the daily trials of ranching, farming, and managing an outfitting business in Colorado. Expect extreme bowhunting and predator action, intertwined with the ups and downs of their authentic field-to-table journey.

programme.title: Legends of the Fall
programme.desc: Legends of the Fall is produced with truly die-hard deer hunters in mind. Legends of the Fall chronicles the high-energy hunts and behind-the-scenes action of a dedicated crew of passionate hunters. While the show spotlights a dynamic variety of adrenaline-pumping whitetail bow hunts across North America, it also offers a mix of other big game adventures. Each episode details the lives of all clan

programme.title: The Woodsman
programme.desc: Join BVO Prostaffers Darren Tippit, Brannon Haro and Joe Bufford as they chase big whitetails in different parts of the country.

programme.title: Savage Outdoors
programme.desc: Travel along with the Savage Outdoors crew as they travel North America on some of the most intense big game hunting adventures ever caught on film!

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steve travels to Tanzania for his first ever hunt in Africa.

programme.title: Dropped: Project Origin
programme.desc: A look at life behind the lens from the men that make it happen.

programme.title: American Made
programme.desc: Pete Roberts is the visionary behind Origin USA, a company uncompromising in its promise to produce 100% American made products; to keep his promise, Pete must challenge the idea that manufacturing must be done overseas.

programme.title: Relentless Pursuit
programme.desc: Tim Wells hosts episode after episode featuring incredible shots on everything from hogs to frogs.

programme.title: Live: NBA Summer League Basketball
programme.desc: From Cox Pavilion in Las Vegas, Nev.

programme.title: TrueSouth
programme.desc: The subject of endless magazine listicles and breathless influencer reels; is it possible to sidestep the algorithms and really see and hear and taste Charleston?

programme.title: Authentic ACC
programme.desc: In this edition of the series produced by Louisville Athletics, get an inside look at Spring Football for the 2025 Louisville Cardinals.

programme.title: Authentic ACC
programme.desc: In this edition of the series produced by Miami Athletics, get an inside look at Spring Football for the 2025 Miami Hurricanes.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The No. 22 Longhorns head to Starkville, Miss., to play the Bulldogs. Texas has won five of its past six after outlasting Kentucky 16-13 in overtime Oct. 18. Entering Week 9, Texas' defense ranked third nationally, allowing only 11.3 points per game.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The No. 9 Commodores (7-1, 3-1 SEC) visit the No. 20 Longhorns (6-2, 3-1). Texas defeated Vanderbilt 27-24 in 2024 in the first meeting since 1928. Vandy hung on for a 17-10 victory last week as a Hail Mary pass by Missouri came up one yard short.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The No. 5 Bulldogs host the No. 10 Longhorns. In 2024, Georgia beat Texas 30-15 in the regular season, and 22-19 in overtime in the SEC title game. Texas held off then-No. 9 Vanderbilt for a fourth straight win Nov. 1. Georgia has won five in a row.

programme.title: Live: Unsportsmanlike with Evan, Canty and Michelle
programme.desc: Start the day off right with Chris Canty, Evan Cohen and Michelle Smallmon providing an energizing and informative way to take on the day. Sports, life and laughter are what it's all about.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The No. 17 Longhorns (7-3, 4-2 SEC) battle the Razorbacks (2-8, 0-6). Texas picked up a 20-10 decision at Arkansas in 2024, but fell 35-10 at then-No. 5 Georgia on Nov. 15 to end a four-game winning run. The Razorbacks have dropped eight in a row.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The unbeaten No. 3 Aggies face the No. 16 Longhorns in a Lone Star Showdown tilt. Texas A&M finds itself in the driver's seat for both an SEC title-game appearance and College Football Playoff berth after starting 11-0 for the first time since 1992.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: Storied programs in the No. 13 Longhorns and the No. 18 Wolverines line up in the Citrus Bowl from Orlando, Fla. Both sides are 9-3. The schools meet for the third time after the Longhorns defeated the Wolverines 31-12 in 2024.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The Cardinal clash with the Cougars from Provo, Utah. Stanford has been off since Aug. 23, when it lost its season opener 23-20 to Hawaii on a last-second field goal. BYU smoked Portland State 69-0 on Aug. 30. BYU took down Stanford 35-26 in 2022.
